title: Reject Record
description: A record used to formally track rejected prompt package submissions.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this reject record.

submission_id.description: Reference to the original submission being rejected.

package_digest.description: The SHA-256 digest of the rejected package.

reasons.description: An array of text reasons explaining why the submission was rejected.

moderator_id.description: Identifier of the moderator rejecting the submission.

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the rejection occurred.
